meaning: 1. military banner; 2. flag signal; 3. (fig.) banner (i.e. false prete
sentence: 他打着慈善的旗号骗取捐款。
pinyin: Tā dǎ zhe císhàn de qíhào piànqǔ juānkuǎn.
english: He used the pretext of charity to swindle donations.

sentence: 公司报销了他的交通费。
pinyin: Gōngsī bàoxiāo le tā de jiāotōng fèi.
english: The company reimbursed his transport costs.

sentence: 这家咖啡馆的饮品种类很多。
pinyin: Zhè jiā kāfēiguǎn de yǐnpǐn zhǒnglèi hěn duō.
english: This café has a wide variety of beverages.

sentence: 他被诊断出代谢综合症。
pinyin: Tā bèi zhěnduàn chū dàixiè zōnghézhèng.
english: He was diagnosed with metabolic syndrome.

meaning: 1. forms for reporting statistics; 2. report forms
sentence: 财务部每月都要提交一份报表。
pinyin: Cáiwù bù měi yuè dōu yào tíjiāo yī fèn bàobiǎo.
english: The finance department must submit a report form every month.
